student.title: Smart QR Attendance Introduction
student.desc: Onboarding introduces QR-based attendance - students scan codes to record presence instantly in lectures and sections.

student.title: Live Performance Tracking
student.desc: Highlights real-time grade, attendance, and course progress monitoring so students always know where they stand.

student.title: Stay In Sync Notifications
student.desc: Explains push notifications from instructors so students never miss schedule changes or session updates.

student.title: Role Selection Portal
student.desc: Landing screen lets users choose Student, Faculty, or Assistant paths with quick links to QR scan, attendance, and grades.

student.title: Student Login Credentials
student.desc: Secure sign-in with email or ID and password, plus Remember Me, Forgot Password, and offline/biometric badges.

student.title: Biometric Identity Verification
student.desc: Step 2 of login prompts fingerprint or face verification without storing raw biometric data on the device.

student.title: Fingerprint Authentication Prompt
student.desc: System dialog requests a fingerprint touch to complete authentication before granting app access.

student.title: Identity Verified Successfully
student.desc: Confirmation that biometric verification passed and the student session is being established.

student.title: Dashboard Feature Tour
student.desc: Guided tour introduces the home dashboard for GPA, predictions, and academic overview at a glance.

student.title: Attendance History Tour
student.desc: Walkthrough shows how to review per-course attendance records and stay on track with participation.

student.title: GPA Calculator Tour
student.desc: Tour explains semester-based GPA planning, credit tracking, and progress estimation tools.

student.title: Profile Management Tour
student.desc: Introduces account settings, security preferences, and profile completion before full app use.

student.title: QR Attendance Feature Tour
student.desc: Demonstrates starting an attendance transaction with face verification plus QR scanning.

student.title: Face Registration Required
student.desc: Prompts new students to register their face before using fraud-resistant QR attendance.

student.title: Multi-Angle Face Capture
student.desc: Guided capture step 4 of 5 asks the student to tilt upward for complete FaceNet enrollment.

student.title: Face Photos Captured
student.desc: All five enrollment angles captured successfully while the profile finishes processing.

student.title: Face Registration Complete
student.desc: Face profile is fully configured, unlocking biometric attendance and identity checks.

student.title: Student Dashboard Overview
student.desc: Home dashboard shows cumulative GPA, semester stats, enrolled courses, credits, and AI performance predictions.

student.title: Performance Predictions Chart
student.desc: Visual chart compares current versus predicted grades across courses for early intervention.

student.title: Course Progress Summary
student.desc: Card view of current and predicted scores for Computer Security, Distributed Systems, and AI courses.

student.title: Computer Security Course Detail
student.desc: Deep dive into one course showing 33% current progress with an 82% predicted final grade.

student.title: Grade Component Breakdown
student.desc: Midterm, year work, attendance, and predicted final exam scores with AI-driven forecasts.

student.title: Search Courses and Faculty
student.desc: Global search from the dashboard to quickly find courses or faculty contacts.

student.title: My Courses List
student.desc: Enrolled courses with search and grade distribution visualization for each subject.

student.title: Course Information Panel
student.desc: Distributed Systems details including semester, credit hours, and lab section information.

student.title: Faculty Directory
student.desc: Searchable faculty list browsable by name, email, or department affiliation.

student.title: Faculty Member Profile
student.desc: Individual faculty card with email, ID, department, and quick contact actions.

student.title: Faculty Quick Actions
student.desc: Shortcuts to email faculty, copy ID, or copy email with long-press tips.

student.title: Overall Attendance Statistics
student.desc: Aggregate attendance rate with per-course lecture and section breakdowns.

student.title: Course Attendance Sessions
student.desc: Session list for Computer Security lectures and sections with absent dates highlighted.

student.title: Attendance Calendar View
student.desc: Monthly calendar color-codes present, absent, mixed, lecture, and section days.

student.title: Live Face Verification
student.desc: Real-time liveness check confirms the student before offline or online attendance is recorded.

student.title: QR Code Scanner
student.desc: Camera view to scan the faculty live-session QR with zoom controls for large lecture halls.

student.title: GPA Trend Chart
student.desc: Semester-over-semester GPA progression with option to add new academic terms.

student.title: GPA Calculator by Semester
student.desc: Add courses, assign grades and credits per semester to calculate and forecast cumulative GPA.

student.title: Semester Grade Management
student.desc: Edit individual course grades and credit weights for accurate semester GPA calculation.

student.title: Student Profile Overview
student.desc: Profile shows student ID, level, major, GPA, and contact information in one place.

student.title: Profile Academic Details
student.desc: Academic level, major, GPA, face registration status, and secure logout access.

student.title: Logout Confirmation
student.desc: Confirms logout intent to safely end the student session and clear local credentials.

faculty.title: Smart Attendance Onboarding
faculty.desc: Faculty onboarding explains QR-based sessions that let students mark attendance instantly during class.

faculty.title: Live Performance Overview
faculty.desc: Introduces real-time tracking of grades, attendance, and course progress for teaching staff.

faculty.title: Instructor Notifications
faculty.desc: Highlights alerts and updates so faculty stay synchronized with sessions and student activity.

faculty.title: Faculty Login Credentials
faculty.desc: Secure sign-in with email or SSN, password, Remember Me, and biometric-ready authentication.

faculty.title: Biometric Identity Verification
faculty.desc: Fingerprint or face confirmation completes faculty login without storing raw biometric templates.

faculty.title: Fingerprint Sensor Prompt
faculty.desc: OS-level dialog requests fingerprint touch to authorize faculty access.

faculty.title: Identity Verified Successfully
faculty.desc: Biometric check passed and the faculty workspace is loading.

faculty.title: Faculty Dashboard Overview
faculty.desc: Today's lectures, active sessions, enrolled students, and live session status at a glance.

faculty.title: Start Live Session
faculty.desc: Select a course and set QR validity duration before generating an expiring attendance code.

faculty.title: Live QR Code Display
faculty.desc: Rotating QR code refreshes every few seconds while students scan to mark attendance.

faculty.title: Adjust Session Time
faculty.desc: Extend or shorten the remaining live session timer while the QR code stays active.

faculty.title: Live Attendance List
faculty.desc: Real-time roster updates as students scan in, with countdown and live status indicators.

faculty.title: Session Ended Summary
faculty.desc: Session closed with option to generate an exportable attendance report.

faculty.title: Generating Attendance Report
faculty.desc: Progress indicator while attendance data is compiled into a printable report.

faculty.title: Report Export Options
faculty.desc: Choose PDF print, Excel export, or share attendance results after a session.

faculty.title: Attendance PDF Preview
faculty.desc: Print-ready PDF preview with session metadata, QR reference, and student attendance list.

faculty.title: Manual Attendance - Course Select
faculty.desc: Pick a course to record attendance manually when QR scanning is not available.

faculty.title: Manual Attendance Setup
faculty.desc: Configure course group, date, and default status before marking students.

faculty.title: Manual Attendance Roster
faculty.desc: Searchable class roster to select students for manual present or absent marking.

faculty.title: Submit Manual Attendance
faculty.desc: Confirm attendance status for the selected student on the chosen date.

faculty.title: Present Status Confirmed
faculty.desc: Success message after marking one student present for the selected session.

faculty.title: Mark Student Absent
faculty.desc: Switch status to absent and select the student to update the record.

faculty.title: Absent Status Confirmed
faculty.desc: Confirmation that the student was marked absent for the chosen date.

faculty.title: Manual Grade Entry - Courses
faculty.desc: Select a course to enter grades manually or import them from Excel.

faculty.title: Grade Entry Configuration
faculty.desc: Set the number of assignments and quizzes before scoring students.

faculty.title: Grade Weight Distribution
faculty.desc: Reference panel showing midterm, quiz, assignment, final, and attendance weightings.

faculty.title: Select Grade Component
faculty.desc: Choose assessment type - midterm, quizzes, assignments, or final exam - before entry.

faculty.title: Enter Student Scores
faculty.desc: Score individual students against the maximum points for the selected assessment.

faculty.title: Grade Saved Successfully
faculty.desc: Confirmation that the grade was stored and course settings remain in sync.

faculty.title: Search Student for Grading
faculty.desc: Filter the roster by name to quickly locate a student for midterm entry.

faculty.title: Excel Upload Format Guide
faculty.desc: Documents required columns and layout for bulk grade import spreadsheets.

faculty.title: Upload Grades from Excel
faculty.desc: Pick course, group, and Excel file to import scores in one batch.

faculty.title: Excel Read Error
faculty.desc: Error state when the selected spreadsheet cannot be parsed for grade import.

faculty.title: Students List Overview
faculty.desc: Browse 404 students with level badges, sorting, and GPA columns.

faculty.title: Student Search Results
faculty.desc: Filtered list showing students matching the active search query.

faculty.title: Filter by Level L4
faculty.desc: Level 4 filter applied to narrow the student roster for targeted review.

faculty.title: Sort Students Z to A
faculty.desc: Reverse alphabetical name sort for quick roster navigation.

faculty.title: Sort Students A to Z
faculty.desc: Default alphabetical listing with level and department badges visible.

faculty.title: Sort Students by ID
faculty.desc: Roster ordered by student identification number for administrative lookup.

faculty.title: Sort Students by GPA
faculty.desc: Performance-based sort to identify high achievers and at-risk learners.

faculty.title: Attendance Records Filter
faculty.desc: Historical sessions filterable by course and week with export actions.

faculty.title: Attendance Export Options
faculty.desc: Print PDF, share PDF, or export Excel for archived attendance sessions.

faculty.title: Attendance Record PDF
faculty.desc: Preview printable attendance report with session details and student statuses.

faculty.title: Faculty Profile Hub
faculty.desc: Quick links to manual attendance, grades, teaching assistants, and statistics.

faculty.title: Teaching Assistants Directory
faculty.desc: Browse 57 T.A.s with email and department information for coordination.

faculty.title: Contact Teaching Assistant
faculty.desc: Email action menu to reach the selected teaching assistant directly.

faculty.title: Teaching Assistant Profile
faculty.desc: Detailed T.A. sheet with ID, department, email, and quick actions.

faculty.title: Profile and Security Settings
faculty.desc: Face registration status, notifications, password, and support preferences.

faculty.title: Login Notification History
faculty.desc: Audit feed of login attempts, successes, and failures for account security.

faculty.title: Account Information
faculty.desc: View faculty ID, email, role, department, and membership date.

faculty.title: Change Password
faculty.desc: Update credentials with current and new password fields plus validation.

faculty.title: Prediction Weights - Theory
faculty.desc: Configure evaluation component weights totaling 100% for non-lab courses.

faculty.title: Prediction Weights - With Lab
faculty.desc: Template including section attendance and practical components for lab courses.

faculty.title: Custom Weights Saved
faculty.desc: Confirmation that modified prediction weights were persisted for the course.

faculty.title: Reset Weights to Default
faculty.desc: Restore the original grade distribution template for AI predictions.

faculty.title: Help and Support FAQs
faculty.desc: Browse common questions about attendance, grades, roles, and app structure.

faculty.title: Extended FAQ Topics
faculty.desc: Additional help articles covering workflows and general ClassTrack usage.

faculty.title: Contact Support
faculty.desc: Email support or copy the help desk address to the clipboard.

faculty.title: Statistics Overview
faculty.desc: Spring 2026 summary with enrolled students, sessions held, and average performance.

faculty.title: Performance Radar Analysis
faculty.desc: Radar and distribution charts break down scores by assessment component.

faculty.title: At-Risk Student Summary
faculty.desc: Average component scores alongside a count of 84 flagged at-risk students.

faculty.title: At-Risk Students List
faculty.desc: Full roster of at-risk learners with attendance percentages for intervention.

faculty.title: Export Statistics Report
faculty.desc: Print or share a PDF statistics summary for academic review meetings.

faculty.title: Statistics PDF Preview
faculty.desc: Multi-page statistics report preview ready for printing or sharing.

faculty.title: Statistics Report Detail
faculty.desc: Detailed report page with average scores and at-risk student analytics.

admin.title: Admin Dashboard Overview
admin.desc: Desktop portal home showing totals for students, faculty, teaching assistants, courses, and departments.

admin.title: Student Type Selection
admin.desc: Modal to register a newcomer or transferred student before entering profile details.

admin.title: Add New Student
admin.desc: Create a student record with ID, name, email, entry year, major, and academic level.

admin.desc: Full student edit form for personal info, entry year, major, and level.

admin.desc: Filtered results listing students matching a name query with ID and major.

admin.desc: Update faculty SSN, full name, email, and department assignment.

admin.desc: Maintain T.A. SSN, name, email, and department code from the admin console.

admin.desc: Find T.A.s by name with SSN, email, and department shown in results.

admin.title: Course Catalog
admin.desc: Master list of courses with codes, titles, credits, and owning departments.

admin.title: Course Offerings by Semester
admin.desc: Spring and fall offerings with section instances tied to academic terms.

admin.desc: Multi-step wizard to open courses, assign resources, and create term instances.

admin.desc: Institution-wide counts for students, faculty, teaching assistants, and courses.

admin.title: Department and Major Mix
admin.desc: Pie charts showing department count and student distribution across majors.

admin.title: Student Analytics Dashboard
admin.desc: Major distribution pie chart and academic level bar chart for enrollment insight.

admin.title: Enrollment Trends 2020-2025
admin.desc: Historical enrollment analytics tracking growth by major over five years.

admin.title: Staff Analytics Overview
admin.desc: Faculty versus T.A. counts, ratios, and comparative staffing bar charts.

admin.desc: Detailed staffing comparison with ratio metrics and side-by-side visualization.

admin.desc: Course totals, department spread, and average courses per department metrics.
